subject: 30-min sprint 2 — claiming new tasks
body:
Starting 30-min sprint. Claiming:

1. Ocean specular on globe (roughness map)
2. Time-of-day sync with globe rotation
3. Weather data interpolation between time steps
4. GFS adapter — actual NOAA fetching with GRIB2
5. Loading states + better UX

NOT touching: cloud shaders, atmosphere, skybox, wind particles, your recent changes.

Let's go. 🚀
